Product overview
Let the sun shine in
An exceptional immune supplement formulated with naturally derived vitamin D3 from wild-harvested lichen and broad-spectrum magnesium from seawater to support and contribute to the maintenance of healthy muscles, bones and teeth, and help your first line of defense function normally.
Content: 60 tablets
Food supplement
The Vegan Society Trademark
The Vegan Society trademark indicates that a product contains no animal ingredients or derivatives, has not been tested on animals, and fully complies with vegan standards. This trusted symbol makes it easy for consumers to choose ethical, animal-friendly products. Read more.
Halal-Control
A product marked HALAL-control certified means it complies fully with Islamic dietary laws. The certification confirms that all ingredients, processing methods, and handling practices adhere to halal guidelines, ensuring the product is permissible for Muslims to consume or use. Read more.
Kosher Certified
This certification means that the product has been prepared according to traditional Jewish dietary laws and inspected by a recognized certification authority. Read more.
ISO 9001 Certification
A company that is ISO 9001 certified adheres to a structured and consistent approach to quality management, customer satisfaction, and continuous improvement across all operations. Read more.
Key Benefits
Supporting the immune system*
Reducing occasional tiredness and fatigue*
Supporting muscle, bone and teeth function*
* These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration.This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
More information
One size does not fit allBetter health is a dynamic process. Our micronutrient status may differ between seasons, as we grow older and when our lives change. Make sure to monitor your status regularly with a blood test every four months to ensure you keep a sufficient supply of vitamin D in your body throughout the year. Based on your current vitamin D status, we give you personalized recommendations on how to maintain or improve your levels with ZinoShine+ in a safe and efficient manner.Vitamin DVitamin D supports important functions within the body, helping to regulate the absorption of calcium and phosphorus, but perhaps the most vital is that it assist with facilitating normal immune system function*. Further, getting a sufficient amount of vitamin D is important for normal growth and development of bones and teeth*. Like most nutritional and health factors, there is a significant amount of individuality when it comes to addressing our vitamin D needs. Many social and behavioral influences affect our ability to get sufficient amounts of vitamin D through sunshine alone. Factors such as being in an area with high pollution, using sunscreen, the amount of time spent indoors, living and working in big cities where buildings block sunlight, all play a part in how our bodies respond to the sun and produce this essential ‘sunshine vitamin’. In addition, your body weight needs to be taken into consideration. Vitamin D is a fat-soluble vitamin and as such the more excess body weight we have, the more we need to produce and consume in order for us to reach and maintain suffcient levels in our blood*. About 1 billion people have vitamin D deficiency worldwide. That is why it is important to both monitor your vitamin D levels and adjust with extra sources of vitamin D besides sunlight whenever necessary.
The source of vitamin D we use is lichen. It is a small unique plant species consisting of a symbiotic association of algae and fungus. It is found on mountainsides, rocks, and trees, in an abundance, and this natural source of Vitamin D3 is a conscious choice made for the sake of our environment.MagnesiumThere are many sources to vitamins and minerals out there. We strive to find the best and most efficient sources available on the market. ZinoShine+ features magnesium hydroxide from seawater, magneisum citrate, magnesium malate and magnesium bisglycinate. Together, these four sources provides a broadspectrum approach for enhanced absorption and utilization in our body*.An all-natural formulationA + behind the name means that all of the ingredients in the product are naturally sourced. We will never stop to look for all-natural alternatives and continue to be frontrunners within our industry. ZinoShine+ consolidates our determination to use rigorously sourced, all-natural ingredients wherever possible. More than that, it can be also be consumed by vegans, since vegan options are an indisputable part of our range too. Naturally.* These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration.This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Ingredients
Other ingredients:
Beta-cyclodextrin from Cassava, Medium Chain Triglycerides (caprylic acid and capric acid from coconut oil), stearic acid.
How to use
Recommended daily dosage: Children 4–11 years:  1 tablet per day. Adolescents 12–18 years:  1–3 tablets per day. Adults > 18 years:  1–4 tablets per day. Do not exceed recommended daily dose. Supplements are not intended as a substitute for a balanced and varied dietStorage: Store dry at room temperature. Best if consumed before the sell date.

```

We will never stop to look for all-natural alternatives and continue to be frontrunners within our industry. ZinoShine+ consolidates our determination to use rigorously sourced, all-natural ingredients wherever possible. More than that, it can be also be consumed by vegans, since vegan options are an indisputable part of our range too. Naturally.* These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration.This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Ingredients
Other ingredients:
Beta-cyclodextrin from Cassava, Medium Chain Triglycerides (caprylic acid and capric acid from coconut oil), stearic acid.
How to use
Recommended daily dosage: Children 4–11 years:  1 tablet per day. Adolescents 12–18 years:  1–3 tablets per day. Adults > 18 years:  1–4 tablets per day. Do not exceed recommended daily dose. Supplements are not intended as a substitute for a balanced and varied dietStorage: Store dry at room temperature. Best if consumed before the sell date.

Product overview
Let the sun shine in
All you need to monitor and support your levels of vitamin D throughout the year with our exceptional immune supplement with naturally derived vitamin D3 and broad-spectrum magnesium, guided by your current uptake of vitamin D in your blood revealed through highly accurate readings of the three factors that influence the individual levels of vitamin D  – exposure to the sun, diet and supplementation.
Please note: Vitamin D Test is not available in New York.
The Vegan Society Trademark
The Vegan Society trademark indicates that a product contains no animal ingredients or derivatives, has not been tested on animals, and fully complies with vegan standards. This trusted symbol makes it easy for consumers to choose ethical, animal-friendly products. Read more.
Halal-Control
A product marked HALAL-control certified means it complies fully with Islamic dietary laws. The certification confirms that all ingredients, processing methods, and handling practices adhere to halal guidelines, ensuring the product is permissible for Muslims to consume or use. Read more.
Kosher Certified
This certification means that the product has been prepared according to traditional Jewish dietary laws and inspected by a recognized certification authority. Read more.
ISO 9001 Certification
A company that is ISO 9001 certified adheres to a structured and consistent approach to quality management, customer satisfaction, and continuous improvement across all operations. Read more.
Key Benefits
Supporting the immune system*
Reducing occasional tiredness and fatigue*
Supporting muscle, bone and teeth function*
* These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration.This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
More information
One size does not fit allBetter health is a dynamic process. Our micronutrient status may differ between seasons, as we grow older and when our lives change. Make sure to monitor your status regularly with a blood test every four months to ensure you keep a sufficient supply of vitamin D in your body throughout the year. Based on your current vitamin D status, we give you personalized recommendations on how to maintain or improve your levels with ZinoShine+ in a safe and efficient manner.Vitamin DVitamin D supports important functions within the body, helping to regulate the absorption of calcium and phosphorus, but perhaps the most vital is that it assist with facilitating normal immune system function*. Further, getting a sufficient amount of vitamin D is important for normal growth and development of bones and teeth*. Like most nutritional and health factors, there is a significant amount of individuality when it comes to addressing our vitamin D needs. Many social and behavioral influences affect our ability to get sufficient amounts of vitamin D through sunshine alone. Factors such as being in an area with high pollution, using sunscreen, the amount of time spent indoors, living and working in big cities where buildings block sunlight, all play a part in how our bodies respond to the sun and produce this essential ‘sunshine vitamin’. In addition, your body weight needs to be taken into consideration. Vitamin D is a fat-soluble vitamin and as such the more excess body weight we have, the more we need to produce and consume in order for us to reach and maintain suffcient levels in our blood*. About 1 billion people have vitamin D deficiency worldwide. That is why it is important to both monitor your vitamin D levels and adjust with extra sources of vitamin D besides sunlight whenever necessary.
The source of vitamin D we use is lichen. It is a small unique plant species consisting of a symbiotic association of algae and fungus. It is found on mountainsides, rocks, and trees, in an abundance, and this natural source of Vitamin D3 is a conscious choice made for the sake of our environment.MagnesiumThere are many sources to vitamins and minerals out there. We strive to find the best and most efficient sources available on the market. ZinoShine+ features magnesium hydroxide from seawater, magneisum citrate, magnesium malate and magnesium bisglycinate. Together, these four sources provides a broadspectrum approach for enhanced absorption and utilization in our body*.An all-natural formulationA + behind the name means that all of the ingredients in the product are naturally sourced. We will never stop to look for all-natural alternatives and continue to be frontrunners within our industry. ZinoShine+ consolidates our determination to use rigorously sourced, all-natural ingredients wherever possible. More than that, it can be also be consumed by vegans, since vegan options are an indisputable part of our range too. Naturally.* These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration.This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Ingredients
Other ingredients:
Beta-cyclodextrin from Cassava, Medium Chain Triglycerides (caprylic acid and capric acid from coconut oil), stearic acid.
How to use
Recommended daily dosage: Children 4–11 years:  1 tablet per day. Adolescents 12–18 years:  1–3 tablets per day. Adults > 18 years:  1–4 tablets per day. Do not exceed recommended daily dose. Supplements are not intended as a substitute for a balanced and varied dietStorage: Store dry at room temperature. Best if consumed before the sell date.
Documents and certificates

Faun Pharma
Non-GMO Statement (Faun Pharma)
```

### Truvy 1. Collagen +BHC - Bahama Mama

- **Brand:** Truvy
- **Product URL:** https://www.zinzino.com/shop/site/US/en-us/products/truvy-all/305060

**Full Product Detail (as published on site):**

```
Collagen +BHC - Bahama Mama
One-time purchase
$50.00
3.2 credits
Save 30%

Premier Price
$35.00
When you purchase a Premier Kit you’ll save up to 60% on all products in our range.

Retail price
$50.00
Subscribe
Add to cart
Product overview
Our unique Collagen+BHC™ drink is a sunrise product made with the purest of ingredients to make a deliciously flavorful addition to your beauty routine. Including bioavailable collagen peptides, biotin, hyaluronic acid, and vitamin C; Collagen+BHC supports joints, hair, skin, & nails as well as skin hydration, elasticity, the immune system and so much more.
Content: 15 packets x 7.9 g
Key Benefits
Reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles
Supports healthy joints & bones
Younger looking skin
Promotes healthy hair, skin, & nails
Provides support for organs
Assists the growth of new skin cells
Improves the appearance of skin elasticity & hydration
Supports a healthy immune system
Supports Cholesterol and Blood Pressure
Dairy Free
Gluten Free
More information
Benefits of Collagen+ BHCAdding a collagen supplement to our daily regimen is proven to support us as we age (since natural collagen levels are depleted as we get older). A rich collagen supplement can help fibroblasts (a type of cell) in your dermis (the middle layer of skin), aiding growth of new cells. It plays a significant role in replacing dead skin cells, promoting structure and elasticity, and providing a protective cover for organs.High-Quality IngredientsCollagen in its purest form, our collagen is thoroughly tested for effectiveness and bioavailability. Vitamin C is a critical and essential vitamin required to properly form collagen-supported structures in the body. Biotin helps the body build keratin, an integral component for glowing hair, skin, and nails. Hyaluronic Acid with anti-aging properties and support for skin hydration, elasticity, and joint lubrication.
Ingredients
Ingredients:
Strawberry Lemonade Natural lemon flavor, citric acid, natural strawberry flavor, malic acid, sodium chloride, sucralose, beet root (natural color), stevia.
Bahama Mama Natural mango flavor, citric acid, malic acid, natural pineapple flavor, sodium chloride, sucralose, beta carotene (for color), stevia.
How to use
Suggested use: Mix 1 packet into a 12-17 fl. Oz glass/bottle of water, stir/ shake and enjoy. This supplement can be taken daily, at any time of day.Warning: These statements have not been evaluated by the food and drug administration. this product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
```

Content: 15 packets x 7.9 g
Key Benefits
Reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles
Supports healthy joints & bones
Younger looking skin
Promotes healthy hair, skin, & nails
Provides support for organs
Assists the growth of new skin cells
Improves the appearance of skin elasticity & hydration
Supports a healthy immune system
Supports Cholesterol and Blood Pressure
Dairy Free
Gluten Free
More information
Benefits of Collagen+ BHCAdding a collagen supplement to our daily regimen is proven to support us as we age (since natural collagen levels are depleted as we get older). A rich collagen supplement can help fibroblasts (a type of cell) in your dermis (the middle layer of skin), aiding growth of new cells. It plays a significant role in replacing dead skin cells, promoting structure and elasticity, and providing a protective cover for organs.High-Quality IngredientsCollagen in its purest form, our collagen is thoroughly tested for effectiveness and bioavailability. Vitamin C is a critical and essential vitamin required to properly form collagen-supported structures in the body. Biotin helps the body build keratin, an integral component for glowing hair, skin, and nails. Hyaluronic Acid with anti-aging properties and support for skin hydration, elasticity, and joint lubrication.
Ingredients
Ingredients:
Strawberry Lemonade Natural lemon flavor, citric acid, natural strawberry flavor, malic acid, sodium chloride, sucralose, beet root (natural color), stevia.
Bahama Mama Natural mango flavor, citric acid, malic acid, natural pineapple flavor, sodium chloride, sucralose, beta carotene (for color), stevia.
How to use
Suggested use: Mix 1 packet into a 12-17 fl. Oz glass/bottle of water, stir/ shake and enjoy. This supplement can be taken daily, at any time of day.Warning: These statements have not been evaluated by the food and drug administration. this product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
```

Product overview
HEART & HYDRATION™ Super Drink was created so you can take your hydration to the next level in a delicious way! Truvy’s H&H™ Super Drink is sugar free, making it an excellent alternative to today’s sugared beverages and is a great fit for any active lifestyle.
Content: 30 packets x 7 g
Key Benefits
Hydration on a cellular level
Supports heart health
Delicious taste with zero sugar
Convenient on-the-go formula
More information
Proper hydration and replenishment of electrolytes on a cellular levelDehydration can destroy proper cell functions and affects virtually every major organ and system. Electrolytes are charged particles found in body fluids that help transmit electrical impulses for the proper functioning of organs. Heart & Hydration™ rehydrates and replenishes electrolytes in a healthy way without the sugar.High-Quality IngredientsCoQ10 is an antioxidant found in all cells throughout the body. It is also an essential co-factor for the conversion of glucose into cellular energy. It is particularly important for the heart, which has continuous energy needs.D-Ribose provides energy for the heart, increasing levels of the energy molecule ATP. Evidence suggests that a diet rich in D-ribose supports endurance.Di-Calcium Malate is a bioavailable form of calcium, which is a key electrolyte for muscle contraction.Potassium Citrate & Potassium Phosphate: Potassium is the key intracellular electrolyte, maintaining cellular balance. It is particularly important in the nervous system, where signals are sent for muscle contraction, especially the heart muscle.Ginseng is widely known for its adaptogenic properties, helping your body to adapt and manage stress better. Managing stress means less stress on the heart.Inulin: is a soluble dietary fiber. It is metabolized by healthy gut bacteria, which produce unique short chain fatty acids that are specifically used by the heart. Inulin can also help support blood sugar levels already within the normal range.
Ingredients
How to use
Warning: These statements have not been evaluated by the food and drug administration. this product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
```

10 Essential Vitamins

Support the immune systemOur Kid’s Dailies provides your child’s immune system with essential nutrients and minerals such as Vitamin C and Zinc.Vitamins can help keep kids healthy and feeling their best.
Support growth and developmentOur Dailies provide a wide range of vitamins and extracts to support children’s growth and development.
Encourage healthy habitsOur vitamins can encourage healthy habits by making vitamins part of your children’s daily routines. This helps kids realize the importance of taking care of their bodies and may lead to an increased interest in healthy eating.
Our vitamins are so yummyOur yummy gummy vitamins make it easy and enjoyable for kids to get all the nutrients they need in a sweet tasting gummy.
Ingredients

Suggested use:

Product overview
Letric™ is here to soothe you. Letric™ uses Truvy’s unique, dual-acting system to displace that pesky ERPD: the capsule works inside your body; while the cream works on the outside. This is, without a doubt, the best option for ERPD, so you can get back to the life you love.
Content: 120 ml
Key Benefits
Soothes everyday muscle stiffness after working out
Cooling, relaxing sensation
Powerful ingredients
Unique Truvy® formula
More information
Benefits of Letric™Letric™ Cream provides that tingling, cooling, warming and relaxing sensation that your muscles will thank you for later. When applied topically, you immediately feel the tingling and soothing action due to Letric™ Cream’s unique, natural ingredients–including the revolutionary Ting flower.High-Quality IngredientsTingflower is a flowering herb within the Acmella Oleracea plant family that creates a considerable tingling–even electric– effect. Tingflower actually works with CB2 receptors and in some cultures, it is even referred to as the ‘toothache plant’ due to its gentle effects. Lectric™ combines Ting Flower extract with other powerful ingredients to make a product that truly works to soothe muscle discomfort from the inside and out.
Ingredients
Ingredients:
Water, Methyl Salicylate, Cinnamomum Camphora (Camphor) Bark Oil, Cetearyl Alcohol, Menthol, Fragrance, Stearic Acid, Zea Mays (Corn) Oil, Glyceryl Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Annona Cherimola Fruit Extract, Butylene Glycol, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Acmella Oleracea Extract, Mentha Arvensis (Cornmint) Oil, Ceteareth-20, Hydroxyethyl Acrylate/Sodium Acryloyldimethyl Taurate Copolymer, Gaultheria Procumbens (Wintergreen) Oil, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Peel Oil, Dimethicone, Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Oil, Phenoxyethanol, Squalane, Caprylyl Glycol, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Capsicum Frutescens Fruit Extract, Xanthan Gum, Ethylhexylglycerin, Hexylene Glycol, Polysorbate 60, Cananga Odorata (Ylang Ylang) Flower, Cinnamomum Camphora (Camphor Gum) Oil, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Matricaria Chamomila (Chamomile) Flower Oil, Violet 2, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice.
How to use
Suggested use: Letric™ cream provides a cooling/tingling sensation to grant near-instant relaxation: just squeeze a small amount onto your fingers or the targeted area/s and rub in generously as needed–and it never hurts to ask a loved one to massage it in for you.Warning: These statements have not been evaluated by the food and drug administration. this product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
```

Product overview
Having the right balance of bacteria is essential for overall digestive health. Keep your gut healthy and happy with our great-tasting Pre+ Probiotic Chews! Kids and adults alike can enjoy their gut health benefits and delicious grape flavor.
Content: 60 tablets
Key Benefits
Made in a dedicated facility to ensure Premium Quality
Maintain Optimal Gut Health
Naturally sourced ingredients
Includes Prebiotics and Probiotics in Every Chew
Kid-friendly
Supports the Immune System
Delicious Grape Flavor
More information
Benefits of Pre+ ProbioticOur Pre+ Probiotic is formulated with prebiotics and probiotics, providing 5 billion CFU per chew (10 billion CFU per serving, at time of manufacture) to maintain a healthy balance of bacteria in your gut. Prebiotics function as a food source for those microorganisms in your gut. These helpfu gut microbiota never let good food go to waste. They’re constantly working hard to help your body digest the food you eat in order to support your immune system. Probiotics are a mixture of live bacteria that naturally occur in your body. This good bacteria helps maintain a healthy balance. You will always have both good and bad bacteria in your body but adding probiotics is a good way to maintain a healthy balance.Why Choose Truvy’s Pre+ Probiotic Chews?More and more studies have shown that a proper balance of bacteria in your digestive system is linked to overall health. Our Pre+ Probiotic Chews can be your new best friend when it comes to helping you maintain harmony in your guts’ ecosystem. Our chews provide the good bacteria (probiotics) with a food source (prebiotics) so they can live longer and work harder to help maintain a healthy balance in your gut. Packed with 5 billion CFU per tablet, our unique chewable Pre+ Probiotics are great for both adults and kids.
Ingredients
Ingredients:
Xylitol, Mannitol, Natural Flavors, Silica, Stearic Acid, Magnesium Stearate, Tartaric Acid, Malic Acid, Stevia Extract.
How to use
Warning: Before starting this or any supplement, please have your healthcare professional evaluate the supplement for compatibility. If pregnant or nursing, taking medication, or if you have a medical condition such as high blood pressure, consult a physician. Keep out of reach of children. If unpleasant side effects occur, discontinue use.These statements have not been evaluated by the food and drug administration. this product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
```

Product overview
Having the right balance of bacteria is essential for overall digestive health. Keep your gut healthy and happy with our great-tasting Pre+ Probiotic Chews! Kids and adults alike can enjoy their gut health benefits and delicious grape flavor.
Content: 60 tablets
Key Benefits
Made in a dedicated facility to ensure Premium Quality
Maintain Optimal Gut Health
Naturally sourced ingredients
Includes Prebiotics and Probiotics in Every Chew
Kid-friendly
Supports the Immune System
Delicious Grape Flavor
More information
Benefits of Pre+ ProbioticOur Pre+ Probiotic is formulated with prebiotics and probiotics, providing 5 billion CFU per chew (10 billion CFU per serving, at time of manufacture) to maintain a healthy balance of bacteria in your gut. Prebiotics function as a food source for those microorganisms in your gut. These helpfu gut microbiota never let good food go to waste. They’re constantly working hard to help your body digest the food you eat in order to support your immune system. Probiotics are a mixture of live bacteria that naturally occur in your body. This good bacteria helps maintain a healthy balance. You will always have both good and bad bacteria in your body but adding probiotics is a good way to maintain a healthy balance.Why Choose Truvy’s Pre+ Probiotic Chews?More and more studies have shown that a proper balance of bacteria in your digestive system is linked to overall health. Our Pre+ Probiotic Chews can be your new best friend when it comes to helping you maintain harmony in your guts’ ecosystem. Our chews provide the good bacteria (probiotics) with a food source (prebiotics) so they can live longer and work harder to help maintain a healthy balance in your gut. Packed with 5 billion CFU per tablet, our unique chewable Pre+ Probiotics are great for both adults and kids.
Ingredients
Ingredients:
Xylitol, Mannitol, Natural Flavors, Silica, Stearic Acid, Magnesium Stearate, Tartaric Acid, Malic Acid, Stevia Extract.
How to use
Warning: Before starting this or any supplement, please have your healthcare professional evaluate the supplement for compatibility. If pregnant or nursing, taking medication, or if you have a medical condition such as high blood pressure, consult a physician. Keep out of reach of children. If unpleasant side effects occur, discontinue use.These statements have not been evaluated by the food and drug administration. this product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

- **Brand:** Truvy

```
TruCafé Ageless Blend™
One-time purchase
$41.00

Product overview
TruCafé Ageless Blend™ is a premium coffee that offers a delightful and invigorating experience for coffee lovers. This special blend is known for its smooth and rich flavor profile, providing a perfect balance of taste and aroma with beauty and anti-aging benefits. Whether you enjoy it hot or iced, this blend is sure to awaken your senses and leave you craving for more.
Content: 30 packets x 2.4 g
Key Benefits
Medium Roast
Rich in antioxidants
Functional Gourmet Coffee
Anti-aging ingredients
Collagen support
Can be consumed hot, cold, or iced
60-90mg caffeine per stick pack
More information
What makes TruCafé unique?TruCafé is a medium roast coffee blend that contains unique ingredients such as Coffee berry fruit, Snow Mushroom, Hyaluronic Acid, and Hibiscus just to name a few. Our TruCafé - Ageless Blend - takes your morning ritual to new heights with its innovative and carefully curated ingredients. One of the standout components of TruCafé is the use of the Snow Mushroom, a prized ingredient known for its exceptional hydrating properties and benefits to the skin. But don't be mistaken – TruCafé is not just about skin care benefits, it also offers a balanced and flavorful medium roast profile that will awaken your senses and please even the most discerning coffee connoisseur. The carefully selected beans are expertly roasted to bring out their natural flavors, resulting in a smooth and satisfying cup of coffee that will kickstart your day.High-Quality IngredientsCoffee berry bean:
Coffee berry is the fruit of the coffee plant (genus Coffea)
It contains two seeds, commonly known as coffee beans
The berries ripen to various colors including red, yellow, or purple
Coffee berry fruit is rich in antioxidants
It is believed to have exceptional beneficial properties
Snow Mushroom (a.k.a. Tremella fuciformis):
Snow Mushroom has unique health benefits including hydrating properties, respiratory health, and immune system support*
It can hold over 500 times its weight in water, providing deep hydration and supporting skin strength and elasticity*
Believed to have immune system-supporting properties*
Hyaluronic Acid (also known as HA):
TruCafé incorporates Hyaluronic Acid, acting as a moisture magnet for skin cells*
It has exceptional water-binding properties, keeping the skin hydrated and plump*
Helps maintain skin elasticity, resulting in a more youthful and firm appearance*
Diminishes the appearance of wrinkles and fine lines by retaining moisture*
Promotes smoother and softer feeling skin, reducing the appearance of skin roughness and pore size.*
Hibiscus:
Hibiscus in TruCafé provides rich antioxidants for daily environmental stressors and a healthy complexion
Good source of Vitamin C*
Nourishes hair follicles, supports healthy hair growth, and reduces breakage*
Natural conditioning properties soften and smooth the hair, adding shine and improving manageability
Hibiscus compounds may reduce hunger signals and inhibit the formation of fat cells*
Supports scalp health and maintains a natural pH balance*
Nourishes hair follicles and supports hair growth*
Colombian Coffee Bean:
TruCafé: Premium Colombian coffee beans, exceptional flavor
Contains naturally occuring antioxidants, as well as Vitamin B2, B3, B5, manganese, potassium, and magnesium
Aids in processing sugar and reducing fatigue
Delightful notes of chocolate, toffee, nuts, and citrus fruits
Ingredients
How to use
Suggested use: Mix one stick of TruCafé™ stick pack into 8 fl oz. (1 cup) of hot water, stir/shake and enjoy. Add milk, cream, or sugar to taste if desired. Can also be enjoyed iced.Warning: These statements have not been evaluated by the food and drug administration. this product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
```

Product overview
Your New Go-To for Body + Mind Balance
TW&E is here to help you take weight and BMI management to the next level. This powerful formula works on multiple fronts—supporting your body as it burns stored fat, helps turn stubborn white fat into energy and keeps you feeling balanced along the way. With ingredients that fuel clarity, ease stress, and support a healthy metabolism, TW&E helps you feel good in both body and mind—without the jitters.
Content: 30 capsules
Food supplement
Key Benefits
Targets stubborn fat by encouraging your body to metabolize white adipose tissue (the “bad” fat).
Transforms fat for good by helping convert white fat into brown fat, which burns more efficiently and gives you clean, steady energy.
Supports your mood + mind with ingredients designed to ease stress, improve focus, and keep you feeling clear and uplifted - without the jitters or crash.
*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
More information
What’s the Secret? When it comes to managing weight and BMI, your body needs more than just a quick fix. That’s where TW&E comes in. This innovative formula goes beyond surface-level results and supports your body from the inside out.Why Pair TW&E with TruFIX? Think of TW&E and TruFIX as your perfect tag team. TruFIX is all about creating balance—helping support healthy blood sugar, cholesterol, and overall body chemistry. TW&E builds on that foundation by targeting fat metabolism, energy production, and cognitive clarity. Together, they help you:
Support healthy weight and BMI management on multiple levels.
Boost natural energy without overstimulating your system.
Promote overall body balance so you feel better, inside and out.
Stay focused, uplifted, and motivated along your journey.
This duo is designed to work with your body, not against it—helping you feel your best every step of the way.
*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
Ingredients
How to use
Suggested use: Take one TW&E™ capsule with one TruFIX® capsule twice a day. Take before breakfast and again in the early afternoon.
```

Product overview
In a world where a robust immune system is more crucial than ever, C-DefenZ offers a targeted approach to enhancing your body’s natural defenses. Our carefully crafted formula provides a daily dose of vital vitamins and minerals that are essential for excellent immune health.
Content: 60 capsules
Key Benefits
Comprehensive Immune Support
Reduces Tiredness and Fatigue
Optimal Blend of Nutrients
More information
Daily Immune FortificationC-DefenZ is designed for daily consumption to continuously support your immune health. Regular intake ensures that your body gets consistent support to help support the body’s defenses by providing key nutrients. Each capsule delivers a balanced mix of immune-supporting nutrients. Vitamin C and Vitamin E work synergistically to enhance your immune functions, while Zinc and Vitamin D play critical roles in maintaining immune response and overall health. The unique combination of B vitamins, including Biotin and Vitamin B6, supports energymetabolism, reducing tiredness and fatigue, and enabling you to stay active and energeticthroughout your day.Support for All SeasonsVitamin D, often difficult to obtain in sufficient amounts from sun exposure alone, is especially crucial during the darker months. C-DefenZ ensures you maintain adequate Vitamin D levels year-round, supporting your immune system and bone health.Comprehensive Immune SupportC-DefenZ is enriched with essential vitamins and minerals like Vitamin C, Vitamin E, Vitamin D, and Zinc, all formulated to support and enhance your immune system's natural defenses, keeping youprotected and resilient.Antioxidant ProtectionPacked with powerful antioxidants, C-DefenZ helps protect your cells from oxidative stress,contributing to overall health and supporting the body’s defenses by providing key nutrients.Advanced Formulation for Maximum Effectiveness
Vitamin C (Ascorbic acid + Calcium Ascorbate): Dual forms of Vitamin C ensure better absorption and effectiveness, supporting the immune system and antioxidant protection.Vitamin E (D-Alpha tocopherol Succinate + D-Alpha tocopherol Acetate): Acts as a powerful antioxidant, protecting the body from damage caused by free radicals.B Complex Vitamins and Biotin: Aid in energy production and reduce tiredness, while also supporting skin health and nervous system function.Zinc Sulphate: Essential for immune function and cell growth, helping your body to stay healthy.
Whether you're looking to bolster your immune defenses, reduce fatigue, or support your overall health, C-DefenZ Capsules provide a powerful blend of nutrients designed to meet your daily needs. Stay protected, energized, and ready to take on whatever comes your way with C-DefenZ.
Ingredients
Ingredients:
Capsule (Gelatin), Vitamine C(Calcium Ascorbate), Bulking Agent (Rice Flour),Vitamin E (D-Alpha tocopherol Succinate), Anti-caking agents (Magnesium Stearate SiliconeDioxyde), Niacin (Nicotinamide), Zinc (Zincsulphate), Vitamin B5 (Panthotenic Acid), VitaminB6 (Pyridoxine HCL), Vitamin B2 (Riboflavine),Vitamin B1 (Thiamine HCL), Vitamine B9 (FolicAcid), Biotin, Vitamine D (Cholécalciferol),Vitamine B12 (Cyanocobalamin).
How to use
Suggested use:
Take 2 Capsules every day. May be used every day to support a healthy immune system.
```

Product overview
Introducing Collagen Complex, our advanced daily formula designed to support your body’s natural collagen production—helping you move better, feel better, and glow from the inside out.Our carefully crafted formula is designed to support your body’s natural collagen production, which is vital to the health of your skin, bones, and joints. As we age, our body produces less collagen, so supplementation is essential to our daily regimen.A smarter, cleaner way to support your joints, bones, and skin—naturally. Invest in your wellness from within.
Content: 60 capsules
Key Benefits
Contains 200mg of Marine Collagen
Formulated with Hyaluronic Acid
Magnesium
Vitamin C & D
Biotin
More information
Youthful Skin, Strong Hair & Nails Formulated with Biotin and Marine Collagen, Collagen Complex helps improve skin elasticity, supports a radiant complexion, and strengthens hair and nails. Beauty starts from within! Strong Bones & Flexible Joints With Vitamin D and Magnesium, this daily supplement supports joint mobility, bone strength, and overall musculoskeletal health—essential as collagen levels decline with age. Antioxidant & Immune Support Vitamin C plays a vital role in collagen synthesis and supports your immune system by fighting off free radicals and oxidative stress. It’s your daily boost for inside-out wellness.
Ingredients
Ingredients:
Capsule Shell - Size 0(HPMC), Bulking agent - Brown Rice Flour, Hydrolysed Marine Collagen, Magnesium Citrate, Vitamin C as Ascorbic Acid 97%, flow agent - Magnesium Stearate (Veg Source), Hyaluronic Acid Sodium (90%), anti-caking agent - Silicon Dioxide (Sipernat 22S), Biotin, Vitamin D3 as Cholecalciferol
How to use
Suggested use:
Take two capsule daily with a glass of water, preferably with a meal. Warning: Results may vary and are not typical. If you are pregnant or nursing, under the care of a physician, or have a medical condition, consult your physician before taking.These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

Product overview
Enjoy the refreshing taste of Glucomannan peach and mango drink, crafted to complement a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle. Each sachet contains 1000 mg of high-quality glucomannan, a dietary fiber from the konjac plant. Glucomannan in the context of an energy-restricted diet, contributes to weight loss.1 The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 3 g of glucomannan in three doses of 1 g each, taken with 1-2 glasses of water before meals.
Content: Net Weight 120g; 1 x 30 Pack of 4 g sachets
Food supplement
Key Benefits
Supports weight loss: Glucomannan is a natural dietary fiber that in the context of an energy-restricted diet, contributes to weight loss.1 The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 3 g of glucomannan in three doses of 1 g each, taken with 1-2 glasses of water before meals.
Low-Calorie, delicious drink: Peach and mango flavor makes it a refreshing and enjoyable beverage that fits into your daily routine. Mixes easily with water to create a low-calorie, high-fiber drink.
Balanced nutritional support: Inulin powder is added as part of the product’s composition. Chromium contributes to normal macronutrient metabolism and the maintenance of normal blood glucose levels.2, 3 Vitamin B6 and folate contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.5, 6, 7 Vitamin D3 contributes to normal the normal function of the immune system4, making the formula a convenient addition to your balanced nutrition routine.
With caffeine: Includes caffeine anhydrous and green tea extract.
More information
Every sachet of Glucomannan Peach & Mango Drink is formulated to be part of a healthy lifestyle routine:
Glucomannan fiberGlucomannan in the context of an energy-restricted diet contributes to weight loss.1 The beneficial effect is obtained with a daily intake of 3 g of glucomannan in three doses of 1 g each, taken with 1–2 glasses of water before meals.
Soluble fiber & botanical ingredientsInulin powder, as a dietary fiber, can be part of a balanced diet, while green tea extract and natural flavorings add a refreshing taste.
A low-calorie choiceEach sachet is a tasty, low-calorie beverage to integrate easily into your daily routine.
Vitamins & mineralsChromium contributes to normal macronutrient metabolism and the maintenance of normal blood glucose levels.2, 3 Vitamin B6 and folate contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.5, 6, 7 Vitamin D contributes to the normal function of the immune system.4

Ingredients:
Konjac Glucomannan Powder (Amorphophallus konjac), L-Carnitine L-Tartrate, Inulin Powder (Cichorium intybus), L- Choline Bitartrate, Natural Flavourings (Mango, Peach, Pineapple), Acidity (Citric Acid, Malic Acid), White Kidney Bean Extract (Phaseolus vulgaris), Green Tea Extract (Camellia sinensis), Anti-Caking Agent (Silicon Dioxide), Sweetener (Sucralose), Caffeine Anhydrous, Ascorbic Acid, Natural Colour (Beta Carotene), Capsaicin Extract (Capsicum annuum), Niacin (Nicotinamide), Pantothenic Acid (Calcium Pantothenate), Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol), Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine Hydrochloride), Chromium (Chromium Picolinate), Folic acid [(6S)-5-methyltetrahydrofolic acid, glucosamine salt].Manufactured in the UK to GMP Standards at a site that is ISO 22000 Accredited.
How to use
Instructions for use: Mix contents with 300ml-500ml of water 3 times daily before meals. Stir until dissolved.
Recommended maximum daily dose: 3 Sachets per day (4 g each), at separate times. Do not exceed recommended dose.
Suitable for Vegetarians and Vegans.
Manufactured in the UK to GMP Standards at a site that is ISO 22000 Accredited.
Caution: Contains caffeine (50 mg per serving). Should not be consumed by pregnant or lactating women and children below 18 years old. Should not be consumed on an empty stomach. Should not be consumed if you are consuming other products containing green tea on the same day. Do not consume a daily amount of 800 mg of EGCG or more (7.5 mg EGCG per serving).
Choking hazard for people with swallowing difficulties or when taken with inadequate fluid intake. Take with plenty of water to ensure the substance reaches the stomach.
Food supplements should not be used as a substitute for a balanced and varied diet.
If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking prescription medication or under medical supervision consult a health professional before taking supplements. Discontinue use and consult a doctor if adverse reactions occur.
Storage: Keep out of reach of young children. Store in a cool, dry place.

Product overview
Inner Cleanse Capsules offer a comprehensive solution designed to rejuvenate your body from the inside out. Combining the power of natural herbal extracts and prebiotic fiber, this formula is dedicated to enhancing your digestive health, supporting detoxification, and boosting your immune system.
Key Benefits
Supports the natural flushing of important pathways that expel waste from the body
Supports the normal digestive process
Supports the body's natural immune defenses
More information
Holistic Approach to Health
This carefully crafted blend not only supports the body’s natural cleansing abilities but also contributes to overall digestive health and immune system support, creating a foundation for long-term wellness.
Targeted Ingredient Synergy From the gut-supporting properties of Psyllium Husk and Licorice Root Extract to the detoxifying benefits of Nettle Extract and Clove Bud Powder, each ingredient is selected for its ability to contribute positively to the body's internal processes.
Promotes Efficient Detoxification Inner Cleanse Capsules are formulated to support the natural detoxification pathways of your body, helping to flush out waste effectively. This process is crucial for maintaining optimal health and vitality. Unlike harsh cleansing programs, Inner Cleanse Capsules provide a gentle yet effective method to support detoxification and cleanse without disrupting your daily life.
Supports Digestive Health With ingredients like Psyllium Husk Powder and Fennel Seed, these capsules aid the normal digestive process and promote intestinal comfort, ensuring your digestive system runs smoothly and efficiently.
Enhances Immune Function Recognizing that a significant portion of the immune system is housed in the gut, Inner Cleanse includes components like Garlic Powder to foster healthy gut bacteria and bolster your body's natural defenses.
Key Ingredients and Their BenefitsPsyllium Husk Powder: Acts as a prebiotic to support good bacteria growth and aids in binding food waste, facilitating smoother digestion.Garlic and Fennel Seed Powders: Help promote a healthy microbiome and support the gut’s role in immune function.Nettle Extract and Alfalfa Powder: Supports appropriate inflammatory response levels and urinary tract health.Chlorella and Aloe Vera Extracts: Known for their detoxifying properties and support in flushing out toxins.Ginger Root and Cayenne Powder: Stimulates digestion and supports healthy circulation, enhancing the overall effectiveness of the detox process.
Inner Cleanse Capsules are ideal for anyone seeking a natural way to support their body’s detox processes, enhance digestive health, and bolster immune defenses. Embrace the holistic benefits of this expertly formulated supplement and step towards a revitalized and rejuvenated you.
Ingredients

Nettle Extract (contains Starch) Alfalfa Powder, Ligourice Root Extract, Cayenne Powder (contains Starch), Organic Chlorella Powder, Aloe Vera Extract, Ginger Root Extract (contains Starch).

Take 2 capsules daily with food or as directed by a health professional.Warning: Results may vary and are not typical. If you are pregnant or nursing, under the care of a physician, or have a medical condition, consult your physician before taking.These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. Keto Complex Capsules provide a dynamic blend of ingredients tailored to support those on a ketogenic diet. By encouraging the body to enter ketosis, where fat is used as the primary energy source, these capsules help streamline your path to weight loss and increased energy.
Content: 60 capsules
Key Benefits
Helps to support sustained periods of energy throughout the day, through promoting ‘ketosis’
Helps to promote metabolism
Helps to support consistent levels of energy and alertness
More information
Optimal Energy Sustainment MCT powder, derived from coconuts, is included to provide a steady release of energy, crucial for those involved in prolonged physical activities like running or cycling, ensuring that you maintain high energy levels without frequent dips.
Enhanced Alertness and Focus Guarana extract, a natural source of caffeine, works to heighten alertness and sharpen focus, giving you the mental edge needed to tackle daily tasks and intense workouts.
Comprehensive Nutritional Support Keto Complex not only supports ketosis but also enriches your body with essential nutrients. Vitamins such as B2, B12, and E, alongside minerals like potassium and magnesium, contribute to overall well-being, supporting everything from energy metabolism to immune function.
Enhances Ketogenic Performance Keto Complex Capsules are designed to support your body's transition to using fat as its primary fuel source, optimizing the ketogenic process. This shift helps maintain high energy levels throughout the day, enhancing both physical and cognitive performance.
Boosts Metabolism Infused with natural ingredients like Guarana extract and essential B vitamins, Keto Complex boosts your metabolism, aiding in faster fat burn and increased energy production, essential for effective weight management and vitality.
Supports Digestive Health With the inclusion of apple cider vinegar, Keto Complex Capsules support healthy digestion and enhance the absorption of nutrients, making this supplement ideal for those with sensitive stomachs or who require digestive aid.
Ingredients
Ingredients:Capsule Shell Gelatin, Rice Flour, Apple Cider Vinegar Powder, Sodium Bicarbonate, Guarana Extract (22% Caffeine) (Starch), Magnesium Stearate (Veg source), Medium Chain Triglycerides Vegan Powder, Vitamin E Acetate (Starch), Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Carbonate, Silicon Dioxide (Sipernat 22S), Potassium Chloride, Magnesium Oxide, Vitamin A Acetate, Pyridoxine Hydrochloride, Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin), Vitamin B12 Pure (Cyanocobalamin).
How to use

Supports muscle endurance and stamina by assisting normalization of acid levels within muscle tissue
Supports the body's main energy source and is used during short bursts of intense activity
More information
Optimized Muscle Function Our innovative blend includes Beta-Alanine, which effectively helps buffer lactic acid produced during exercise. This action delays the onset of muscle fatigue and enhances muscle endurance and stamina.
Enhanced Energy Production Creatine Monohydrate in our formula boosts the synthesis of ATP, providing your muscles with the energy needed for high-intensity exercise. This leads to improved workout performance and the potential for increased muscle mass and strength.
Improved Circulation and Recovery L-Arginine, known for its role in nitric oxide production, supports the cardiovascular system during workouts. This not only boosts performance but also speeds up recovery by enhancing the delivery of oxygen and nutrients to strained muscle tissues.Enhances Muscle Endurance and Stamina Formulated with Beta-Alanine, Muscle Advanced Capsules help manage the accumulation of lactic acid in muscles during exercise, significantly enhancing endurance and delaying fatigue. This allows you to train harder and longer, pushing your limits for peak performance.
Boosts Energy and Workout Intensity With Creatine Monohydrate as a key ingredient, these capsules support rapid ATP production, the primary energy carrier in cells. This boost in energy production contributes to more explosive workouts and can help increase muscle size and strength over time.
Supports Increased Blood Flow and Nutrient Delivery Enriched with L-Arginine, Muscle Advanced supports increased blood flow, ensuring that more oxygen and nutrients reach your muscles. This not only enhances performance but also aids in faster recovery post-workout.
Ingredients
Ingredients:
Capsule Shell Gelatin, Brown Rice Flour, Beta-Alanine, L-Arginine AKG, L-Arginine Hydrochloride, Magnesium Stearate (Veg Source), Creatine Monohydrate, Silicon Dioxide (Sipernat 22S), Nicotinamide (Niacin).
How to use
Suggested use:
Take 1 capsule twice a day before food.Warning: Results may vary and are not typical. If you are pregnant or nursing, under the care of a physician, or have a medical condition, consult your physician before taking.These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
```

Product overview
Unlock a new addition to your daily routine with SKNY-U, a unique formula featuring Terpenes Complex and hops cellular extract (Humulus lupulus). This carefully developed blend brings together selected ingredients in a convenient liquid format designed for daily use as part of an active lifestyle and fitness-focused routine. Easy to take and simple to integrate into your routine, SKNY-U is a practical companion for your everyday wellness habits. Simply take 1–2 ml daily.
Content: 30 ml
Food supplement
Key Benefits
Designed to complement an active lifestyle
Created for your daily wellness routine
Featuring terpene complex and hops cellular extract
Convenient liquid formula for daily use
More information
The power of our ingredientsTerpenes Complex or “Terprozol”
A unique terpene complex combined with hops cellular extract (Humulus lupulus), developed as part of the SKNY-U formula.
These carefully selected ingredients are included to complement a lifestyle focused on fitness and body goals.
The formula is designed for individuals looking to stay consistent with their routine and as part of an active lifestyle.
Terprozol Formula
The terpene complex in SKNY-U contributes to the distinctive profile of the formula. Together with hops extract, it forms a carefully developed ingredient combination intended for those pursuing fitness and active lifestyle goals.
Synergistic Benefits
The carefully selected combination of ingredients in SKNY-U creates a balanced formula designed to complement your fitness routine and daily wellness habits. This holistic approach focuses on supporting individuals who want to stay committed to their goals and maintain an active lifestyle.
We believe that achieving your fitness goals shouldn’t come at the expense of flavor. SKNY-U is free from artificial additives and offers a clean, carefully developed formula to complement your daily routine. Make SKNY-U part of your journey toward a more active and balanced lifestyle.

How to use
How to use: Take 1–2 ml daily, preferably with food. SKNY-U can be taken directly or mixed into your favorite beverage. Do not exceed the recommended daily dose.
Please note: As a naturally sourced product, each batch may vary slightly in color, smell, or texture. Food supplements are not intended as a substitute for a balanced and varied diet and a healthy lifestyle. Keep out of reach of young children.
Storage: Dry at room temperature, away from direct sunlight.

Product overview
Introducing Sleep Support Capsules, your ultimate solution for unwinding effectively at the end of each day. These capsules are specially designed to support and enhance your natural sleep cycle, providing a holistic approach to improving sleep quality.
Key Benefits
Designed to help promote a healthy sleep cycle
Promotes deeper and more restful sleep, contributing to overall night-time comfort
Supports the normal function of the nervous system, aiding in relaxation and mental calmness before sleep
More information
Carefully Formulated Blend Each ingredient is selected for its specific benefits related to sleep enhancement. Chamomile is renowned for its calming and sedative effects, while L-Tryptophan is essential for melatonin production, crucial for regulating your sleep cycle.
Nutritional Support for Sleep Vitamin B6 plays a pivotal role in supporting the nervous system. Enhanced with Zinc and Niacin, our capsules not only improve sleep quality but also contribute to overall health, supporting enzyme reactions in the nervous system and maintaining immune function.
Gentle and Effective With Brown Rice Flour incorporated to aid absorption, our capsules ensure a slow and steady release of the active ingredients, enhancing effectiveness and making it easier for your body to unwind naturally.
Promotes Deep, Restorative Sleep Our Sleep Support Capsules are formulated to help you achieve deeper and more restful sleep, ensuring you wake up feeling refreshed and recharged. With natural ingredients like Chamomile and L-Tryptophan, each capsule contributes to overall nighttime comfort.
Supports Healthy Sleep Cycles Harnessing the power of L-Tryptophan, our capsules aid your body’s natural production of melatonin, the hormone responsible for regulating sleep-wake cycles. This supports a smoother transition to sleep and helps maintain a healthy sleep pattern.
Aids Relaxation and Mental Calmness Enriched with Vitamin B6 and Chamomile, Sleep Support Capsules support the normal function of the nervous system, promoting relaxation and mental calmness that prepare your body and mind for a good night's sleep.
Ingredients
Ingredients:
Capsule Shell HPMC (contains Hypromellose), Chamomile Powder, L-Tyrosine Vegan Fermented, L-Tryptophan (contains Starch), Zinc Citrate, Magnesium Stearate (Veg Source), Nicotinamide (Niacin), Silicon Dioxide, Brown Rice Flour.
How to use
Suggested use:
Take 1 capsule daily, before bedtime or as directed by a health professional.Warning: Results may vary and are not typical. If you are pregnant or nursing, under the care of a physician, or have a medical condition, consult your physician before taking.These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
```

Product overview
Wake up to SolRoast, a premium Arabica-style instant coffee designed to complement your active lifestyle. Carefully formulated with a blend of natural coffee, botanicals, amino acids, vitamins, and minerals, SolRoast delivers a naturally enjoyable coffee experience while supporting your daily wellness routine.
Key Benefits
Caffeine: Contains 230 mg caffeine per serving from instant coffee, caffeine anhydrous, and guarana extract.
Energy metabolism support: Vitamin B6 and vitamin B12 contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism and the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.1,2,3,4 While chromium contributes to normal macronutrient metabolism and the maintenance of normal blood glucose levels.5,6
Source of fiber: Acacia gum provides dietary fiber that can be included as part of a balanced diet.
More information
Every cup of Sol Roast is carefully crafted with a blend of coffee, amino acids, and botanical extracts:
Amino Acids L-citrulline and L-tyrosine are included as part of the amino acid profile to complement the coffee experience.
L-TheanineA naturally occurring component of tea, included contributes to the smooth and balanced coffee flavor.
Botanical Extracts Green coffee extract, green tea extract, mucuna pruriens extract, and Korean ginseng extract are included as part of the botanical blend, adding depth to the flavor and complementing a ritual of daily enjoyment.
Ingredients
Supplement facts
Serving size: 1 sachet (3.92g)Servings per container: 30
Nutrition and ingredient information
Typical values per serving (3.92g)
NRV%
Coffee 100% Arabica

Ingredients:
Spray-Dried Coffee (Coffee Arabica), Emulsifier (Acacia Gum), Caffeine Anhydrous, Acidity Regulator (Sodium Bicarbonate), Anti-caking agent (Silicon Dioxide), L-Citrulline, Guarana Extract (Paullina cupana), L-Theanine, Green Coffee Extract (Coffea Arabica L.), Green Tea Extract (Camellia sinensis L), Mucuna Pruriens Extract (Mucuna Pruriens), Korean Ginseng Extract (Panax Ginseng ca Meyer), L-Tyrosine, Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine Hydrochloride), Chromium (Chromium Picolinate), Vitamin B12 (Methylcobalamin).
Blended and packed in the UK from imported ingredients.
How to use
Recommended daily dosage: Mix one (1) sachet with 250ml - 500ml water and stir until dissolved.
Recommended maximum daily dose: 1 Sachet (3.92g). Do not exceed recommended dose. Suitable for Vegetarians and Vegans. Manufactured in the UK to GMP Standards at a site that is ISO 22000 Accredited.
Caution: Contains Caffeine (230 mg per one serving). Not recommended for children or pregnant or breastfeeding women.Contains green tea extract. Should not be consumed on an empty stomach. Should not be consumed if you are consuming other products containing green tea on the same day. Do not consume 800 mg or more of EGCG per day.Food supplements are not intended as a substitute for a balanced and varied diet and a healthy lifestyle. Consult a healthcare professional before use if you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking medication, or have a medical condition.
Storage: Keep out of reach of young children. Store in a cool, dry place.
Documents and certificates

Product overview
Introducing T-Cleanse, your natural pathway to detoxification and internal balance. This delicately blended detox tea is crafted with a selection of hand-picked natural ingredients known for their supportive roles in promoting health and cleansing the body.
Content: 78 g
Key Benefits
Promotes Digestive Health: T-Cleanse is enriched with naturally soothing ingredients like Peppermint Leaves and Chamomile Flower, designed to relax the digestive system and supports a healthier gut environment.
Supports Natural Detoxification: Infused with powerful botanicals such as Senna Leaf and Buckthorn Bark, T-Cleanse aids in cleansing the body, promoting the elimination of toxins and supporting overall detoxification processes for enhanced well-being.
Boosts Kidney and Skin Health: Ingredients like Uva-Ursi Leaf and Rosehip are incorporated for their health-promoting properties, including diuretic benefits that support kidney health and high levels of Vitamin C that help protect and rejuvenate the appearance of the skin.
More information
Comprehensive FormulaEach ingredient in T-Cleanse plays a specific role in enhancing your body's natural processes. Senna Leaf, known for its laxative properties, helps supports th bowels, while Honeysuckle and Buckthorn promote toxin reduction and improve and support intestinal lubrication.Supports a Variety of Body Functions From aiding digestive health to supporting kidney and bladder functions, T-Cleanse works holistically. Orange Peel and Rosehip provide a rich source of Vitamin C, essential for immune support and skin health.Natural and Gentle With only 5 calories per serving and sweetened naturally with Stevia, T-Cleanse is a gentle yet effective option suitable for daily use as part of a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle.Peppermint and ChamomileOffer natural soothing properties that enhance digestive health and support the symptoms of discomfort.Marshmallow RootKnown for its mucilaginous properties, it helps soothe the lining of the digestive tract.Honeysuckle and BuckthornAct as natural detoxifiers with added benefits for skin and intestinal health.Uva-UrsiSupports urinary tract health with its cleansing properties.Fibersol-2A digestion-resistant maltodextrin serving as a prebiotic to promote healthy gut bacteria.
Ingredients
Ingredients:  Fibersol-2, Orange Peel powder, Chamomile Flower extract, Honeysuckle Flower extract, Marshmallow Root extract, Rosehip extract, Uva Ursi Leaf extract, Peppermint Leaf extract, Senna Leaf extract, Buckthorn Bark extract, Sweetener (Stevia).
How to use
How to use T-Cleanse in the pouch: Enjoy the refreshing and soothing taste of T-Cleanse any time of the day. Simply mix 1 sachet (2.6g) in 200ml of hot or cold water and stir until fully dissolved. For best results, use T-Cleanse regularly alongside a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle to support its natural detoxifying benefits and help maintain internal balance.How to use T-Cleanse in the tub:Enjoy the refreshing and soothing taste of T-Cleanse any time of the day. Simply mix 1 Scoop (2.6g) in 200ml of hot or cold water and stir until fully dissolved. For best results, use T-Cleanse regularly alongside a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle to support its natural detoxifying benefits and help maintain internal balance.
```

Product overview
Get a Blast of Flavor – with Functional Benefits!
Enjoy Tropical Blast, a pineapple-flavored drink mix designed to fit into your active lifestyle. Each serving provides:
80 mg of caffeine
A source of protein (from whey protein isolate), which contributes to the growth and maintenance of muscle mass1, 2
Chromium, which contributes to normal macronutrient metabolism and the maintenance of normal blood glucose levels3, 4
A dietary fiber blend (inulin and acacia gum)
Just 18.6 kcal per 5 g serving – a low calorie, tropical-tasting option
Content: 150 g (30 × 5 g sachets)
Food supplement
Key Benefits
Stay Energised & Focused:  With 80 mg of caffeine per serving, Tropical Blast contributes to increased alertness and improved concentration – the perfect pick-me-up to support your busy day. Tropical Blast combines caffeine, protein, fibre, and chromium to support alertness, muscle maintenance, digestion, and normal blood glucose levels. A balanced formula designed to fit into your healthy lifestyle and weight management goals.
Support Your Nutrition Goals: Each serving provides whey protein isolate, a source of high-quality protein that contributes to the growth and maintenance of muscle mass1, 2. Chromium contributes to normal macronutrient metabolism and helps maintain normal blood glucose levels3, 4. Thanks to chromium’s role in supporting normal blood glucose levels, Tropical Blast helps you stay balanced between meals – making it easier to stay on track with your nutrition plan.
Contains Fibre: Tropical Blast contains inulin and acacia gum a source of dietary fibre, designed to be part of a balanced diet.
More information
Introducing Tropical Blast – more than just a delicious pineapple-flavored drink. This carefully crafted blend combines refreshing taste with functional ingredients designed to fit into your everyday lifestyle: Caffeine Contains 80mg of caffeine. Protein (whey isolate) Contributes to the growth and maintenance of muscle mass1, 2. Chromium Contributes to normal macronutrient metabolism and the maintenance of normal blood glucose levels3, 4. Inulin and acacia gum Dietary fibers that can be included as part of a balanced diet. Beta carotene A source of vitamin A, which contributes to the maintenance of normal vision and the normal function of the immune system5, 6. Tropical Blast is lightly sweetened with sucralose for a balanced flavor without unnecessary calories. With chromium contributing to the maintenance of normal blood glucose levels4, Tropical Blast fits easily into your daily routine and balanced nutrition plan, including as a low-calorie and refreshing option between meals when prepared with water as instructed.
Ingredients
Nutrition value
Serving size: 1 sachet (5 g)Servings per container: 30
Nutrition and ingredient information:
Typical values per serving (5g)
NRV%

Ingredients:
Inulin Powder (Cichorium intybus), Emulsifier (Acacia Gum), Acid (Citric Acid), Whey Protein isolate (MILK), Natural Flavourings (Coconut, Pineapple), Anti-Caking Agent (Silicon Dioxide), Bitter Orange Extract (Citrus Sinensis), Garcinia Cambogia Fruit Powder (Garcinia cambogia L.), Raspberry Fruit Whole Extract (Rubus idaeus), Natural Colour (Beta Carotene), Caffeine from Coffea robusta, Sweetener (Sucralose), Chromium (Chromium Picolinate).Blended and packed in the UK from imported ingredients.
How to use
Suggested Use: Mix 1 sachet (5g) serving with 500 ml water. Do not exceed recommended dose. Do not exceed recommended daily dose. Food supplements are not intended as a substitute for a balanced and varied diet.
Caution: High caffeine content. Not recommended for children or pregnant or breast-feeding women. A medical professional should be consulted before taking the product if you are pregnant, nursing or have a medical condition and/or before giving to children.
Storage: Dry at room temperature. Keep out of reach of children.
Documents and certificates
Product sheet for Tropical Blast
```

Product overview
Ultimate Greens: a meticulously crafted superfood drink designed to support and enhance your daily wellness routine. This premium formula not only nourishes your body but also revitalizes your health with a symphony of natural ingredients, delivering exceptional nutritional benefits with each sip.
Key Benefits
Comprehensive Nutritional Support
Enriched with high levels of Zinc, Vitamin B6, and Vitamin C
Enhanced Energy and Vitality
Immune and Antioxidant Protection
Organic antioxidant greens blend
More information
Diverse Blend of SuperfoodsUltimate Greens includes a dynamic array of greens such as Chlorella, Barley Grass, and Alfalfa, alongside potent fruits like Bilberry and Cranberry. This diversity ensures a wide range of phytonutrients, essential for health and vitality. Packed with 26 essential fruits and vegetables, Ultimate Greens provides a full spectrum of nutrients, vitamins, and minerals. This rich blend is designed to fulfill daily nutritional gaps, ensuring your body receives the balanced support it needs for optimal function.
Physical and Mental Well-beingThe inclusion of adaptogenic herbs like Siberian Ginseng and natural energizers such as Matcha Green Tea helps manage stress and enhances mental clarity and focus. Ingredients like Spirulina, Matcha Green Tea, and Siberian Ginseng invigorate your body and mind, keeping you active and alert throughout the day.With high levels of Vitamin C, Zinc, and Vitamin B6, Ultimate Greens enhances your immune system's functioning and provides powerful antioxidant protection.
Promotes Digestive HealthWith ingredients like Apple Fiber and Pea Fiber, Ultimate Greens supports healthy digestion, ensuring that nutrients are efficiently absorbed and utilized by the body.Delicious Natural Berry FlavorEnjoy the delightful taste of natural berries, making this nutrient-rich drink a pleasure to consume. No need to compromise on taste when you’re getting your daily dose of vitamins and minerals.
Ingredients
Ingredients:Spirulina Powder, Pea Fibre 70% Powder, Tri-potassium Citrate), Flavour, Apple Fibre (Pectin) Powder, Parsley Leaf Powder, Acid (Dl-Malic Acid, Citric Acid), Barleygrass Juice Powder, Powdered Spinach, Calcium Carbonate, Choline Bitartrate, Sunflower Lecithin, Fruit & Veg Powder, Flow Agent (Silicon Dioxide), Ascorbic Acid, Chlorella Powder, Magnesium Malate, Alfalfa Extract 5:1, Siberian Ginseng Powder (25:1 Extract - 0.8% Eleuthrosides), Stevia (97% Rebaudioside) Extract, Matcha Green Tea Powder, Turmeric Powder, Watercress Powder, Rosemary Leaf Powder, Plantain Leaf Powder, Dandelion Herb/Leaf Powder, Lemongrass Powder, Freeze Dried Blackberry Fruit Powder, Acerola Extract (25% VIT C), Green Tea Extract 40% Polyphenols, Dulse Powder, Bilberry Fruit Extract (1% Anthocyanidins), Cranberry Fruit Powder, Pyridoxine HCl, Zinc Citrate, Methylcobalamin.
How to use
How to use:Mix one scoop of the fine powder into water, juice, or your favorite smoothie. Drink it first thing in the morning to kickstart your day or after a workout to replenish your body with essential nutrients.
```

Product overview
IGNITE. ENHANCE. REVITALIZE.
Burn+ fuels metabolism with vitamin B12, green tea extract, ElevATP® and Capsimax®, while supporting healthy blood sugar levels with cinnamon and alpha lipoic acid.
Content: 60 Capsules
Key Benefits
Boosts metabolism with Vitamin B12, Capsimax® and ElevATP®
Supports energy production at the cellular level
Helps maintain healthy blood glucose levels with cinnamon and alpha lipoic acid
Supports fat burning and appetite control
Stimulates thermogenesis for increased calorie burn
*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
More information
Capsimax®
Capsimax® is an extract from red chili peppers (Capsicum annuum) that supports weight management by increasing thermogenesis and fat burning without causing stomach discomfort. This natural ingredient helps promote calorie expenditure, making it a key component for metabolic support.
ElevATP®
ElevATP® is a clinically proven blend of ancient peat and apple extract that enhances ATP production, the body’s principal energy source. By supporting cellular energy levels, ElevATP® contributes to improved physical performance and overall vitality.
Vitamin B12
Vitamin B12 plays a crucial role in increasing metabolism and supporting efficient mitochondrial function. It helps convert nutrients into usable energy, assisting in overall metabolic efficiency.
Creatine HCL
Creatine HCL supports energy production by providing essential fuel for the mitochondria, the body’s energy factories. It is known to enhance strength, endurance, and overall physical performance.
Alpha Lipoic Acid
Alpha Lipoic Acid is a powerful antioxidant that supports metabolism and mitochondrial health. It helps neutralize free radicals while playing a role in energy production and cellular protection.
D-Ribose
D-Ribose is a natural sugar that supports mitochondrial function and energy production. It aids in ATP synthesis, ensuring the body has the necessary energy to function optimally.
Green Tea Extract
Green Tea Extract promotes thermogenesis, which increases calorie burning, and provides antioxidants that support overall health. It is widely recognized for its beneficial effects on metabolism.
Green Coffee Extract
Green Coffee Extract is rich in chlorogenic acid, which supports metabolism and helps maintain healthy blood pressure levels. It aids in fat metabolism and provides natural energy support.
Coenzyme Q10
Coenzyme Q10 is found in every cell of the body and plays a crucial role in energy generation. It is especially important for high-energy organs like the heart and brain, ensuring optimal cellular function.
Cinnamon Extract
Cinnamon Extract helps maintain healthy blood glucose levels. It supports metabolic balance and plays a role in stabilizing energy levels throughout the day.
Ingredients
Other Ingredients:
Rice Concentrate, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Maltodextrin.
How to use
How to use:Adults, take two (2) capsules with water, preferably with a meal, as a dietary supplement, or as directed by a doctor.Notice:Each serving contains approximately 25 mg of natural occurring caffeine. Not recommended for children, pregnant women or people sensitive to caffeine.
```

Product overview
SUPPORT. NOURISH. RESTORE.
Cleanse+ supports gut health with magnesium, fiber from apples, prunes, flax seeds, Actazin® kiwifruit and probiotics, enhancing digestion and bowel regularity.
Content: 60 Capsules
Key Benefits
Supports digestive health with natural ingredients
Promotes bowel regularity and improved digestion
Reduces bloating and discomfort
Provides probiotics and prebiotics for a balanced gut microbiome
Gentle, effective relief for occasional digestive issues
*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
More information
Actazin®
Actazin® is a kiwifruit-derived ingredient that promotes bowel regularity, supports protein digestion, and reduces bloating. It contains natural enzymes and fiber that aid in smooth digestion and overall gut health.
Magnesium (Amino Acid Chelate & Magnesium Oxide)
Magnesium plays a key role in digestive health by helping to relax intestinal muscles and soften waste material, promoting smooth and comfortable digestion.
Fiber Blend (Apple, Prune, Fig, Flax Seed, and Rice Concentrate)
This fiber-rich blend adds bulk to stool for easier passage and helps maintain regularity. These natural ingredients support digestive function and contribute to overall gut wellness.
Agave Inulin
Agave Inulin is a prebiotic fiber that nourishes beneficial gut bacteria and provides a source of soluble fiber for digestive health. It supports a balanced gut microbiome and promotes intestinal well-being.
Bacillus Coagulans
Bacillus Coagulans is a probiotic that helps maintain a healthy balance of gut bacteria, supporting overall digestive health. It contributes to a well-functioning digestive system by promoting beneficial microorganisms in the gut.
Ingredients
Other Ingredients:
Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Stearic Acid, Maltodextrin, Rice Flour
How to use
How to use:Adults, take two (2) capsules with water, preferably with a meal, as a dietary supplement or as directed by a doctor.
```

Product overview
Zurvita Performance H2O is a delicious, tropical-flavored performance-boosting hydration drink mix. It contains premium ingredients that work together to provide hydration through low-glycemic carbohydrates, electrolytes and more.
Content: 10 Packets of 5.2 g (.20 OZ) per box
Key Benefits
For people of all ages
Gluten-free
Vegan-friendly
No sugar crash
Free from artificial flavors or colors
No preservatives
*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
More information
Informed SportThe Informed Sport logo signifies that every batch of this product is tested for substances banned in sports before being released into the marketplace. There are no artificial colors, flavors or preservatives.
Ingredients
Other Ingredients:
Citric Acid, Natural Flavors, Vegetable Juice (For Color), Silicon Dioxide, Stevia Leaf Extract. *Allergen: Contains Soy, Tree Nuts (Coconut)
How to use
How to use:Mix one stick pack with 8 fluid ounces of water. Take before, during or after a workout or any physical activity. Storage: Store product away from excessive heat, light and humidity.Notice: Safe for consumption for people of all ages. Fluid replenishment is essential and should always be readily available and never restricted prior to, during, and after vigorous play or exercise. In general, water is recommended during vigorous play in the pediatric population. Zurvita Performance H2O is a safe alternative or adjunct to supplement water intake during activities in moderation not exceeding more than 8 oz./day of Zurvita Performance H2O. Adults may take as needed or as directed by your physician.
```
